description: Persist a long-term user preference via the memory tool so later sessions can read it (covers chat memory write path)

turns.user: Please remember a long-term preference: sensor-001 is mounted by the north-east window in the living room, and its ambient temperature typically reads 2 degrees below room temperature. Reference this when I mention sensor-001 in the future.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent invokes the `memory` tool (action=update/set, section=user or knowledge) to persist the specified content
expectations.overall: Must actually call the memory tool to persist (not just restate in the reply), and confirm the write
